message:
fix(security): harden password hashing, timing attacks, and admin auth

## Password Hashing (share-link-store.ts)
- Replace plain SHA256 with PBKDF2-SHA256 (OWASP recommended)
- Add 128-bit random salt per password
- Use 100,000 iterations for computational resistance
- Store as "salt:hash" format for secure verification
- Maintain backwards compatibility with legacy SHA256 hashes

## Timing Attack Prevention (share-link-store.ts)
- Replace string === comparison with crypto.timingSafeEqual()
- Prevents side-channel timing attacks on password verification
- Add length check before comparison to handle different buffer sizes

## Admin Auth Bypass (permissions.ts)
- Remove automatic dev bypass in non-production environments
- Require explicit JFP_ADMIN_DEV_BYPASS=true to enable dev mode
- Block external origins even with dev bypass enabled (localhost only)
- Add console warnings when bypass is active for visibility
- Production always requires JFP_ADMIN_TOKEN (no bypass possible)

## useLocalStorage Edge Case (useLocalStorage.ts)
- Replace `instanceof Function` with `typeof value === "function"`
- Safer across iframe boundaries where Function constructor differs

Security Impact: Critical - fixes vulnerabilities that could allow:
- Rainbow table attacks on password-protected share links
- Timing-based password extraction attacks
- Unauthorized admin access in development environments

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
